output.config_snippet:
SqlServerTable(
    source_schema='dbo',
    source_table='PARTNER_COMMISSION',
    target_schema='STAGING',
    target_table='STG_PARTNER_COMMISSION',
    primary_key='COMMISSION_ID',
    incremental_column='MODIFIED_DATE',
    warehouse='LOADING_S',
),

decision_log.rationale: Read existing sql_server_tables.py to match formatting. Used MODIFIED_DATE as incremental column (supports CDC via timestamp). LOADING_S warehouse per convention.

alternatives_considered.reason: MODIFIED_DATE is better — captures updates, not just inserts
